title: juncus effusus var. gracilis
intro: Juncus effusus var. gracilis, commonly known as soft rush or green rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Juncus effusus var. gracilis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Soft rush can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
